name: hostel-management-system
description: A full-stack Hostel Management System built with Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and EJS

scripts.stop:ports: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if ($pids) { $pids | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; exit 0"

author: Pratham
